Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

==Japanese Content== {{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|新潟県|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Archaeological_sites_in_Niigata_prefecture here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
